languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

languages.text: "Сколько служу Империуму, впервые вижу такое пламенное рвение у того, кто намеревается отправиться прямиком в пасть чудовища. С другой стороны, абсолютно все криминальные отбро... то есть, неблагонадежные элементы, мыслят совершенно одинаково. Не буду мешать тебе с этим".

"In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

"In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

languages.text: 「帝国に仕える長い年月の中で、初めて、こんなにも怪物に飛び込むことを待ち望む人間を見た。だが、犯罪者や不快な連中は皆同じだ。君を止めるつもりはない」
languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国に仕える長い年月の中で、初めて、こんなにも怪物に飛び込むことを待ち望む人間を見た。だが、犯罪者や不快な連中は皆同じだ。君を止めるつもりはない。」

languages.text: « C'est bien la première fois dans ma longue carrière au service de l'Imperium que je vois quelqu'un qui a autant hâte de se jeter dans la gueule du loup. Enfin, il est vrai que toutes les vermines criminelles... pardon, que tous les individus peu recommandables ont la même façon de penser. Je ne vous retiendrai pas. »
languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

traits.locale_text: « C'est bien la première fois dans ma longue carrière au service de l'Imperium que je vois quelqu'un qui a autant hâte de se jeter dans la gueule du loup. Enfin, il est vrai que toutes les vermines criminelles... pardon, que tous les individus peu recommandables ont la même façon de penser. Je ne vous retiendrai pas. »

languages.text: "In all den Jahren, die ich dem Imperium nun schon diene, hat sich noch niemand vor meinen Augen kopfüber in den Schlund eines Monsters gestützt. Andererseits denken alle Verbrecher ... also alle unappetitlichen Elemente gleich. Ich werde nicht versuchen, Euch aufzuhalten."
languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

traits.locale_text: "In all den Jahren, die ich dem Imperium nun schon diene, hat sich noch niemand vor meinen Augen kopfüber in den Schlund eines Monsters gestützt. Andererseits denken alle Verbrecher ... also alle unappetitlichen Elemente gleich. Ich werde nicht versuchen, Euch aufzuhalten."

languages.text: "İmparatorluk'a hizmet ettiğim onca yıldır bir canavarın ağzına balıklama atlamaya bu kadar hevesli birini ilk kez görüyorum. Yine de tüm suçlu pislikler... Yani nahoş unsurlar aynı şekilde düşünür. Seni durdurmaya çalışmayacağım."
languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk'a hizmet ettiğim onca yıldır bir canavarın ağzına balıklama atlamaya bu kadar hevesli birini ilk kez görüyorum. Yine de tüm suçlu pislikler... Yani nahoş unsurlar aynı şekilde düşünür. Seni durdurmaya çalışmayacağım."

languages.text: «En mis largos años al servicio del Imperium, esta es la primera vez que veo a alguien tan dispuesta a arrojarse de cabeza a las fauces de un monstruo. Por otro lado, la gentuz... digo, los truhanes piensan todos igual. Ni siquiera voy a hacer el amago de detenerla».
languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

traits.locale_text: «En mis largos años al servicio del Imperium, esta es la primera vez que veo a alguien tan dispuesta a arrojarse de cabeza a las fauces de un monstruo. Por otro lado, la gentuz... digo, los truhanes piensan todos igual. Ni siquiera voy a hacer el amago de detenerla».

languages.text: “我为帝国效命多年，还是头一次见有人如此急不可待地冲进怪物的血盆大口。不过说到底，所有犯罪分子——我是说，危险人物——想法都差不多。我也懒得拦你。”
languages.original_text: "In all my years serving the Imperium, this is the first time I've seen anyone so eager to rush headlong into the jaws of a monster. Then again, all criminal filth... I mean, unsavoury elements, think alike. I won't try to stop you."

traits.locale_text: “我为帝国效命多年，还是头一次见有人如此急不可待地冲进怪物的血盆大口。不过说到底，所有犯罪分子——我是说，危险人物——想法都差不多。我也懒得拦你。”
